parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
=Hi {{ $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.firstName }},

Your KineticOS Operational Diagnostic Report is attached to this email.

Your score: {{ $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.score }}/60

Open the PDF for your full breakdown — including your primary diagnosis, 3 prioritized recommendations, and a quick win you can act on this week.

To your operating clarity,
KineticOS

kineticos.co

_comment: Import this file in n8n: Workflows → Import from File. Then set credentials: Supabase (URL + service key), Resend (HTTP Header Auth with Authorization: Bearer re_xxx). Set env var MODAL_PDF_URL to your deployed Modal endpoint URL.
